---
title: "Commander Colin MacKenzie Dundas"
---

## Commander Colin MacKenzie Dundas

**Dates:** (1842-1911)

### Description

R.N., nephew of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

He succeeded to Ochtertyre; he married.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from July 27th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
